notes_zh:
- **新增** 辅助功能未授权时，状态栏菜单顶部直接显示「授权辅助功能权限」快捷入口
- **新增** 查看链接时若标题未抓到，后台自动补抓（旧数据也能逐步补全标题）
- **优化** 链接预览：加载中展示静态卡片（favicon + URL + 标题 + 按钮），加载完才切到网页
- **优化** 静态链接卡片：标题放大突出、URL 蓝色链接样式、加入 domain / 协议 badge 和复制按钮
- **优化** 富文本预览：剥离源端黑/灰底色，深色模式下中灰字自动调整为可读色
- **优化** 大文本场景（10MB+）选中时后台计算字符/行/词数，不再卡死界面
- **优化** 网页预览使用真实 Safari UA，百度等站能正常渲染
- **优化** 剪贴板预览在代码/链接条目下 Header 更简洁，信息不再与属性区重复
- **优化** 部分性能优化，感谢 @miniers 贡献
- **修复** 文件名（如 xxx.conf、yyy.log）被误识别为链接
- **修复** 同一 URL 从不同应用复制产生重复记录
- **修复** 快捷面板切换链接预览时残留上一条网页画面
- **修复** 查看已删除条目时可能出现的 SwiftData 僵尸对象崩溃
- **修复** 搜索框过滤时可能重复触发两次查询
notes_en:
- **New** When accessibility permission is missing, surface a quick 'Grant Accessibility Permission' entry at the top of the status-bar menu
- **New** Auto-retry link title fetch when viewing a link whose title is empty (backfills legacy entries over time)
- **Improve** Link preview: static card (favicon + URL + title + buttons) stays visible until the web page finishes loading, no more flashes of the previous page
- **Improve** Static link card: larger prominent title, accent-colored URL, domain / scheme badges and Copy action
- **Improve** Rich-text preview: strip source opaque black/grey backgrounds and adapt low-contrast foregrounds for dark mode
- **Improve** Selecting huge clips (10 MB+) no longer freezes the UI; line / word / char counts and code summaries are computed off the main thread
- **Improve** Web preview uses a real Safari UA, so sites like baidu.com render correctly
- **Improve** Code and link preview headers trimmed — no duplicate metadata with the properties row
- **Improve** Various performance improvements, thanks to @miniers
- **Fix** Filenames like foo.conf / bar.log were misclassified as links
- **Fix** The same URL copied from different apps produced duplicate entries
- **Fix** Switching link previews in the quick panel sometimes left the previous page's content visible
- **Fix** SwiftData zombie-object crash when viewing a just-deleted item
- **Fix** Search debounce could trigger the query twice per keystroke
